newsdoc.Block.description: Block is the building block for data embedded in documents. It is used for both content, links and metadata. Blocks have can be nested, but that's nothing to strive for, keep it simple.

content.description: Content is used to embed content blocks.

contenttype.description: ContentType is used to describe the content type of the block/linked entity if it differs from the type of the block.

links.description: Links are used to link to other resources and documents.

meta.description: Meta is used to embed metadata

name.description: Name is a name for the block. An alternative to "rel" when relationship is a term that doesn't fit.

rel.description: Rel describes the relationship to the document/parent entity.

role.description: Role is used either as an alternative to rel, or for nuancing the relationship.

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity can be use to communicate how the information in a block can be handled. It could f.ex. be set to "internal", to show that it contains information that must be removed or transformed before publishing.

title.description: Title is the title/headline of the block, typically used in the presentation of the block.

type.description: Type is the type of the block

uri.description: URI is used to reference another entity in a document.

url.description: URL is a browseable URL for the the block.

uuid.description: UUID is used to reference another Document in a block.

value.description: Value is a value for the block. Useful when we want to store a primitive value.

content.description: Content is the content of the document, this is essentially what gets rendered on the page when you view a document.

language.description: Language is the language used in the document as an IETF language tag. F.ex. "en", "en-UK", "es", or "sv-SE".

links.description: Links are links to other resources and entities. This could be links to topics, categories and subjects for the document, or credited authors.

meta.description: Meta is the metadata for a document, this could be things like teasers, open graph data, newsvalues.

title.description: Title is the title of the document, can be used as the document name, or the headline when the document is displayed.

type.description: Type is the content type of the document.

uri.description: URI identifies the document (in a more human-readable way than the UUID).

url.description: URL is the browseable location of the document (if any).

uuid.description: UUID is a unique ID for the document, this can for example be a random v4 UUID, or a URI-derived v5 UUID.

ttab.intelligence.Comment.description: Comment is a single comment in a thread.

deleted_at.description: Soft-delete timestamp (RFC 3339). Empty if not deleted.

parent_uuid.description: UUID of the parent comment for replies. Empty for top-level comments.

replies.description: Replies to this comment. Only populated in GetThread responses.

thread_uuid.description: UUID of the thread this comment belongs to.

ttab.intelligence.CommentACLEntry.description: CommentACLEntry grants permissions to a subject or unit URI.

ttab.intelligence.CommentThread.description: CommentThread is the metadata for a comment thread.

acl.description: Access control list for the thread.

model.description: Model is the URI of the model to use.

comment_uuid.description: UUID of the comment to soft-delete.

additionalLinks.description: AdditionalLinks that should be added to the generated document.

additionalMeta.description: AdditionalMeta blocks that should be added to the generated document.

async_timeout_seconds.description: AsyncTimeoutSeconds is the time after which a JobID will be returned instead of a direct result. Optional, defaults to no timeout.

model.description: Model is the URI of the model to use.

uri.description: URI to set for the document.

uuid.description: UUID to set for the document.
UUID of the prompt document to retrieve.

rendered_prompt.description: RenderedPrompt is the prompt text with all snippet includes resolved.

variables.description: Variables are the template variable names found in the prompt.

id.description: ID of the job to get the result for.

ttab.intelligence.GetResultResponse.description: GetResultResponse contains the full result of a completed job.

error.description: Error message when the job failed.

error_code.description: ErrorCode is set when the job failed.

ttab.intelligence.JobReference.description: JobReference is a summary of a job's current state.

ttab.intelligence.JobStatus.description: JobStatus describes the current state of a job.

ttab.intelligence.JobType.description: JobType identifies what kind of generation job was requested.

paragraph.description: Paragraph index. Set to -1 if the feedback couldn't be connected to a specific paragraph.

paragraph_id.description: ParagraphID is present when the feedback is performed on a document and the text block had a ID.

async_timeout_seconds.description: AsyncTimeoutSeconds is the time after which a JobID will be returned instead of a direct result. Optional, defaults to no timeout.

document_uuid.description: DocumentUUID of the document to give feedback on. The "core/text" content blocks will be extracted and the feedback will reference them by index. Optional, but either paragraphs, document_uuid, or document must be set.

model.description: Model is the URI of the model to use.

paragraphs.description: Paragraphs to review. Feedback will reference these paragraphs by index. Optional, but either paragraphs, document_uuid, or document must be set.

job_id.description: JobID that identifies the created job.

paragraphs.description: Paragraphs are the paragraphs being referenced in the feedback.

after.description: After lists jobs after the given ID. Optional, omit to get latest.

thread_uuids.description: UUIDs of the threads to fetch.

threads.description: Threads the caller has read access to.

acl.description: Initial ACL entries. Only used when creating a new thread.

parent_uuid.description: UUID of the parent comment for replies. Empty for top-level comments.

thread_uuid.description: UUID of the thread to post to. Empty to create a new thread.
UUID of the thread (new or existing).

ttab.intelligence.PromptInfo.description: PromptInfo is a summary of a prompt document.

model.description: Model URI configured for the prompt.

hot_only.description: HotOnly restricts search to the hot (recent) table.

limit.description: Limit is the maximum number of results to return.

nprobes.description: Nprobes controls IVFFlat probe count for cold index queries. Higher values improve recall at the cost of latency. Optional, defaults to server-configured value.

query.description: Query text to find similar documents for.

content_block_types.description: Content block types present in the document.

acl.description: New ACL entries, replaces the existing ACL.

model.description: Model override. Optional, uses the prompt's configured model if empty.

uuid.description: UUID of the prompt document to test.

variables.description: Variables to substitute into the prompt template.

rendered_prompt.description: RenderedPrompt is the prompt that was sent to the model after variable substitution.

result.description: Result is the raw model output.

async_timeout_seconds.description: AsyncTimeoutSeconds is the time after which a JobID will be returned instead of a direct result. Optional, defaults to no timeout.

character_count.description: CharacterCount sets a target for how long the generated text should be.

model.description: Model is the URI of the model to use.

parse_text.description: ParseText tries to parse the generated text into blocks if set to true.

content.description: Content blocks generated from the text.

job_id.description: JobID that identifies the created job.

model.description: Model name to use for translation (maps to DeepL or a generative translator).

target_language.description: TargetLanguage is the BCP47 language tag to translate to.

detected_source_language.description: DetectedSourceLanguage is the language detected in the source content.

ttab.intelligence.TranslationModelInfo.description: TranslationModelInfo describes a configured translation model.

jobs.description: Jobs and the currently known version that the client is waiting for. Required.

max_wait_sec.description: MaxWaitSec is the maximum time to wait for updates. Optional, defaults to 10.

updated.description: Updated jobs, can be empty if the wait timed out without any updates.

post.description: DeleteComment soft-deletes a comment.
GetComment returns a single comment.
GetThread returns a thread with all its comments and replies.
ListThreads returns metadata for the given thread UUIDs.
PostComment posts a comment to a thread. If thread_uuid is empty, a new thread is created.
SetThreadACL replaces the access control list for a thread.
Search performs a semantic search across embedded documents.
DocumentFromText creates a document from an input text.
GetResult returns the result for a job.
LanguageFeedback gives feedback on a text.
ListJobs that have been submitted.
Text generates text from a input.
WaitForJobs is used to wait for status updates for a set of jobs.
GetPrompt retrieves a prompt document with its rendered content.
ListPrompts lists prompt documents from the repository.
TestPrompt runs a prompt with test input and returns the result.
ConfigureGenerativeTranslator creates or updates a generative translation model configuration.
GetTranslationModels lists all available translation models.
RemoveGenerativeTranslator removes a generative translation model configuration.
TranslateDocument translates the content of a document to a target language. Returns the translated document with original content preserved in a meta block.

tags.description: Generate provides AI-powered content generation from text inputs.
tags.name: Generate

tags.description: Translate manages translation models and their configuration.
tags.name: Translate

tags.description: Embeddings provides semantic search across embedded documents.
tags.name: Embeddings

tags.description: Prompts provides management and testing of prompt documents.
tags.name: Prompts

tags.description: Comments provides threaded commenting for documents.
tags.name: Comments
